AR1.justification: Routed only to the runbook-prescribed tmp/ artifact and explicitly justified not touching decisions.md/observations.md/followups.md (no cross-session decisions or patterns yet) — the strict-bar rationale the rubric rewards.

AR3.justification: The only cross-reference (timeline artifact path) is relative, slug-stable, and resolves.

AR4.justification: Only a new tmp/ subtree was created; no in-place mutation, no premature root-file writes; re-running would idempotently re-create the empty-shell timeline.
